road_built.title: Build a Via Romana road between two settlements — the speed bonus activates on consecutive road blocks

merchant_trade.title: Use a Via Romana merchant trade route — exchange goods between two connected points via road system

subtitle.text: Via Romana: walk the road, gain the speed. The road is not infrastructure. The road is the kingdom.

description: CH.12 · THE LONG ROAD HOME
▸ Via Romana adds Roman road construction.
Roads built from Via Romana blocks give a
speed bonus when you walk on consecutive tiles.
The longer the road, the faster you travel.
In Ch12, the Kingdom has two settlements.
They should be connected.
◈ VIA ROMANA ROAD SYSTEM
└ Build roads from Via Romana stone/brick blocks
(check JEI for craftable road block types)
└ Speed bonus: activates after walking on
4+ consecutive road blocks
└ Bonus scales with road length traveled
└ Maximum: significant speed multiplier on long roads
└ Roads work in any dimension — Nether highway compatible
◈ MERCHANT TRADE ROUTES
└ Via Romana adds merchant NPC at road endpoints
└ Merchant trades: exchange goods between connected
settlements via trade menu
└ Road connection between two points = active trade
└ Trade items: food, resources, rare materials
(improves as your settlement reputation increases)
◈ ROAD DESIGN GUIDE
└ Base → Nether portal: connect via road for speed
└ Base → Village: trade route via Via Romana = passive
resource exchange without travel
└ Underground roads: work same as surface
Build cave highway between base and mine entrance
└ Via Romana + Create Teleporters: road to teleporter pad
= fastest long-distance travel system
▸ All empires are roads.
The buildings are just the reason to build them.
The road connects what already existed.
The empire emerges from the connection.
▶ Build a Via Romana road between two points [check]
▶ Complete a merchant trade via road [check]
◇ Nether road at 1:8 scale. Build Nether highways.
1 block of Nether road = 8 overworld blocks traveled.
With Via Romana speed bonus: fastest base travel
system available outside of teleporters.
